items.text:
BIO 101: Introduction to Biology — Laboratory Component

The laboratory portion of BIO 101 is worth 30% of your final course grade and is taught in Harmon Science Center, Room 118. Your lab grade is calculated as follows:

- Weekly lab reports: 40%
- Midterm practical exam (October 14): 25%
- Final practical exam (December 9): 25%
- Attendance and participation: 10%

All students must purchase a personal safety goggle set from the campus bookstore for $12 before the first session on September 8; loaner goggles are not provided. Lab reports are due at the start of each Monday session. Late reports lose 10% per day and will not be accepted more than three days after the deadline.

Attendance is mandatory. Students may miss one session without penalty, but a second absence lowers the participation grade by one full letter. To make up a missed practical exam, you must submit written documentation to Dr. Alvarez within one week. Please arrive on time, as the safety briefing is given only once.

questions.stem: According to the syllabus, where is the laboratory component of BIO 101 taught?

options.A: In the annex of the campus bookstore
options.B: In Dr. Alvarez's private faculty office
options.C: In the main biology department lecture hall
options.D: In Room 118 of Harmon Science Center

questions.explanation: The opening line states the laboratory portion "is taught in Harmon Science Center, Room 118."

questions.stem: According to the syllabus, what must students do before the first lab session on September 8?

options.A: To submit a signed safety waiver form online
options.B: To complete a virtual laboratory orientation module
options.C: To purchase a safety goggle set for $12
options.D: To register early for a makeup practical exam

questions.explanation: The syllabus says all students "must purchase a personal safety goggle set from the campus bookstore for $12 before the first session on September 8."

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who arrives late to the first lab session?

options.A: They will forfeit their goggle deposit for the whole term.
options.B: They may miss the safety briefing, which is not repeated.
options.C: They can attend the safety briefing at a later session.
options.D: They must retake the midterm practical exam within a week.

questions.explanation: The syllabus notes the safety briefing "is given only once," so a student who is late may miss it and cannot make it up in a later session.

items.text:
Subject: Plumber Coming Thursday — Need Your Help

Hi Dana,

I finally got the landlord to send someone about the leak under the kitchen sink. The plumber, Mr. Reyes from Cedar Maintenance, is scheduled to come this Thursday, May 21, between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM. Since I have my chemistry lab until noon that day, I won't be home to let him in.

Could you please be there to open the door? If you can't, we will have to reschedule for next week, and the landlord warned that the leak could damage the cabinet if we wait much longer. You don't need to do anything except let him in and point him to the sink, since he will bring his own tools.

One more thing: the repair costs $75, which the landlord will split with us, so we each owe $37.50. I already left my half in cash in the envelope on the counter. Could you add yours before Thursday so I can pay him in full?

Thanks so much for handling this — I really appreciate it.

Best,
Priya

format_metadata.subject: Plumber Coming Thursday — Need Your Help

questions.stem: According to the email, when is the plumber scheduled to arrive?

options.A: Thursday afternoon, from noon until 1:00 PM
options.C: Next Wednesday during the early afternoon
options.D: This Friday before the chemistry lab

questions.explanation: Priya writes that Mr. Reyes "is scheduled to come this Thursday, May 21, between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM."

questions.stem: What can be inferred about what will happen if Dana cannot be home on Thursday?

options.A: The repair will be postponed and the cabinet could suffer damage.
options.B: The landlord will pay for the full repair without any help.
options.C: Priya will skip her lab to open the door herself.
options.D: The plumber will return the same day with new tools.

questions.explanation: Priya says that if Dana can't be there they will "have to reschedule for next week," and the landlord warned the leak "could damage the cabinet if we wait much longer," so delaying risks damage.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of Priya's email?

options.A: To complain to the building landlord about a slow repair
options.B: To ask Dana to admit the plumber and split payment
options.C: To remind Dana about her upcoming chemistry lab class
options.D: To schedule a brand-new maintenance visit for next week

questions.explanation: The email asks Dana to let the plumber in on Thursday and to contribute her half of the repair cost, making these two requests its main purpose.
